lessons.title: What is Phishing? 🎣
lessons.description: The billion-dollar hook. Understanding the scale and psychology of email-based attacks.

lessons.title: Email Spoofing & Impersonation 📧
lessons.description: How attackers forge sender addresses, bypass SPF/DKIM, and create lookalike domains.

lessons.title: Crafting the Perfect Phish ✍️
lessons.description: Subject lines, body copy, and visual design that bypasses logic and triggers clicks.

lessons.title: Landing Pages & Credential Harvesting 🕸️
lessons.description: Cloning login portals, evading detection, and capturing credentials in real-time.

lessons.title: Advanced Phishing Techniques 🚀
lessons.description: MFA bypass, adversary-in-the-middle attacks, QR codes, and SMS phishing.
